findings.title: Missing 'category' Column for 'finding_feedback' Table in SQL Migration
findings.message: The database migration script adds the 'category' column to the 'findings' table, but fails to add it to the 'finding_feedback' table. However, the Prisma schema has been updated to include 'category String?' on the 'FindingFeedback' model, and 'FeedbackService.ingest' attempts to write to this property. This mismatch will cause database insertion errors and server crashes when ingesting feedback.
findings.impact: Any attempt to ingest finding feedback on the server will crash with a PostgreSQL database error ('column "category" of relation "finding_feedback" does not exist'), completely breaking the feedback ingestion feature in production.
findings.suggestion: Add 'ALTER TABLE "finding_feedback" ADD COLUMN "category" TEXT;' to the migration script.
findings.verification: Run the database migrations on a PostgreSQL instance, then execute a review comment feedback ingestion flow. Observe that the transaction fails with a PostgreSQL error due to the missing column.
